keyEvents.text: Goal! Spain 1, Saudi Arabia 0. Lamine Yamal (Spain) right footed shot from the right side of the six yard box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Mikel Oyarzabal with a cross.

Goal! Spain 2, Saudi Arabia 0. Mikel Oyarzabal (Spain) left footed shot from the left side of the six yard box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Aymeric Laporte with a headed pass following a corner.
Goal! Spain 3, Saudi Arabia 0. Mikel Oyarzabal (Spain) left footed shot from very close range to the top right corner. Assisted by Dani Olmo with a headed pass.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Salem Al Dawsari (Saudi Arabia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
First Half ends, Spain 3, Saudi Arabia 0.
Substitution, Spain. Yéremy Pino replaces Lamine Yamal.
Substitution, Spain. Ferran Torres replaces Mikel Oyarzabal.
Substitution, Saudi Arabia. Mohamed Kanno replaces Abdullah Al Khaibari.
Substitution, Saudi Arabia. Abdullah Al Hamddan replaces Musab Al Juwayr.
Own Goal by Hassan Al Tambakti, Saudi Arabia. Spain 4, Saudi Arabia 0.
Mohamed Kanno (Saudi Arabia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Delay in match because of an injury Rodri (Spain).
Substitution, Saudi Arabia. Mohammed Abu Al Shamat replaces Feras Al Brikan.
Substitution, Saudi Arabia. Alaa Al Hejji replaces Abdulelah Al Amri.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, Spain. Mikel Merino replaces Dani Olmo.
Substitution, Spain. Nico Williams replaces Álex Baena.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Substitution, Spain. Fabián Ruiz replaces Pedri.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Delay in match because of an injury Mohamed Kanno (Saudi Arabia).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, Saudi Arabia. Khalid Al Ghannam replaces Nasser Al Dawsari.
Second Half ends, Spain 4, Saudi Arabia 0.
